productDisplayName: Timberland Kids Boys Brown Casual Shoes
description: A perfect gift for your little boy who is fast growing up, the timberland Grafton Hill Chukka boot combines the best of style and comfort to make your young man feel all the more grown up. With a classic design and cushioned comfort, it's a great way to prepare him for adoloscent fashion.UpperSuede upper with synthetic leather lining at the collar for absolute comfort and durabilityVelcro straps on the midfoot to customise FitPerforations on the upper with a meshed fabric inner lining for enhnaced ventilationHaul loop in leather with a nubuck inner to hang the shoe Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortMidsoleOrthoilite footbed with leather footbed cover for absolute shock absorption, lightweight cushioning, climate control, odour resistance and to wick away moistureRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticEVA midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleGrainy textured durable non-marking rubber outsole with multi-directional TPR units on the forefoot. lateral midfoot and heel for durability, grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
